task_text: agent-41-owner-wellbeing-v0.1 — quiet-hours guard at shift-agent-notify-owner chokepoint. Adds OwnerWellbeingConfig (enabled, quiet_start, quiet_end, quiet_days, critical_priority_threshold) to schemas.py + OwnerNotificationSuppressed audit variant + guard in main() that suppresses Pushover/WhatsApp delivery during quiet hours when priority < threshold. Tests cover in-window/out-window, cross-midnight, weekday filter, priority bypass. Weekly load summary patch deferred to v0.2. No external APIs, no new scripts, no SKILL changes — pure config + script-guard work.
